creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Add missing pkg-plist to fix deinstallation

How-To-Repeat: % cd /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/
% make NOPORTDOCS=yes WITH_IMAGEMAGICK_MODULES=yes WITH_IMAGEMAGICK_OPENMP=yes WITH_IMAGEMAGICK_THREADS=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_FPX=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_LQR=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_MSL=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_PDF=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_TESTS=yes WITHOUT_IMAGEMAGICK_TTF=yes install
...
% make deinstall
===>   Deinstalling ImageMagick-nox11-6.5.2.10
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/lib/ImageMagick-6.5.2/modules-Q16/coders'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/lib/ImageMagick-6.5.2/modules-Q16'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/lib/ImageMagick-6.5.2'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
% ls -la /usr/local/lib/ImageMagick-6.5.2/modules-Q16/coders/
total 1
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   9166 Jun 24 17:05:14 2009 cals.a
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   1153 Jun 24 17:05:14 2009 cals.la*
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  12103 Jun 24 17:05:14 2009 cals.so*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   5854 Jun 24 17:05:17 2009 hald.a
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   1153 Jun 24 17:05:17 2009 hald.la*
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   9487 Jun 24 17:05:17 2009 hald.so*
